diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,158 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../hono-base
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono apps with handler/middleware composition.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for matched routes and paths.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helpers for reading, writing, and deleting cookies.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing client for creating HTTP clients from Hono apps.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment access helper.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for generating hashed class names and styles.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR
+- Reads as: none
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities for hashing, minification, and class name generation.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests with RFC compliance.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Development tools for inspecting routes and handlers.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and string concatenation helpers.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: exports ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper main entry point exporting all SSG functions.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGResult, DefaultOutputDir, FileSystemModule
+- Reads as: ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG generation function for static site creation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.test.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, SSEMessage, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper main entry point exporting all streaming APIs.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming API for chunked response streaming.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming API for event pushes.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../context/TEXT_PLAIN, ./
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Text streaming API with plain content-type.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Accept header matching for content negotiation.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Acce
